# Grand Thera Docs

Public documentation index for Grand Thera open engineering material.

## Pages

- Overview: docs/index.html
- Algorithm notes: docs/ALGORITHM.md
- Frontend context: docs/FRONTEND_CONTEXT.md
- Symbolic regression frontend context: docs/SYMBOLIC_REGRESSION_FRONTEND_CONTEXT.md

## Public Links

- Website: https://www.grandthera.com/
- Open Engineering API docs: https://api.thera-os.com/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/grandthera
- Medium: https://medium.com/grand-thera/about
- AIT Regimes Detection demo: https://grandthera.github.io/AIT-regime/
- AIT Regimes Detection: public Open Engineering 
- AIT Neural SDE demo: https://grandthera.github.io/AIT-neural-sde/
- AIT Neural SDE : public Open Engineering 
- Symbolic Regression demo: https://grandthera.github.io/AIT-symbolic/

## Scope

This public documentation describes product positioning, public API entry points,
and open engineering artifacts. It does not disclose Grand Thera production
source code, private orchestration systems, client deployments, production
model calibration layers, credentials, or internal architecture.
